name: Lemon Angel Hair Pasta
method: Boil a pot of salted water. In the meantime, in a large frying pan on medium heat, melt butter. Add cream, lemon, zest, salt, and pepper. Stir until blended. If your sauce is too watery you can slowly add 1 T flour or cornstarch dissolved in 2 T cold water, drop by drop to thicken. Right before turning off heat add minced garlic and stir. Turn off the heat. Add angel hair pasta to boiling salted water, cook for a minute, because that's all it takes to cook angel hair pasta, then drain and mix into the creamy sauce. Mix, mix, mix, and then manticare! Top with parsley and fresh grated parmesan. Serving suggestion: fresh bread and salad. Serves 2-3. Olé
